name: Vegan"eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine all ingredients except nutmeg.
2. Blend thoroughly, stopping occasionally to scrape down the sides.
3. Serve well chilled and dusted with nutmeg.
NOTE: This vegan eggnog is rather susceptible to the flavor of alcohol, so you may want to start with smaller amounts if adding alcohol to your nog and add more as necessary.
